pr.title: Record: 11L + Multi-Order N-gram Backoff + Entropy-Adaptive Alpha (val_bpb=0.6672)

output.summary: 11-layer GQA base augmented with eval-time multi-order n-gram cache and entropy-driven interpolation to blend neural and cache predictions.
techniques: GQA 11L base with XSA4/VE128 and quantized int6/GPTQ-lite stack
Sliding-window n-gram cache (orders 2-7) backing off on misses
Entropy-adaptive alpha weighting n-gram vs. LM outputs
